## setQueryFromLastHistoryQueryWire variable

Sets the next queries state `query` with the last query in history queries.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
setQueryFromLastHistoryQueryWire: import("../..").Wire<import("@empathyco/x-types").HistoryQuery[]>
```
